description: Conduct a broad search on the definition of Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA), its purpose, and importance in data protection regulations.
Identify and summarize the key components involved in conducting a DPIA.
Outline the steps involved in performing a DPIA.
Gather examples of situations when a DPIA is required according to data protection regulations.
Research the implications of DPIA for organizations, including potential consequences of not conducting one.
